content.speakerText: Wait, you're from Chengdu? I went there last year — best hot pot ever!
content.speakerTextCn: 等等，你是成都的？我去年去过，那里的火锅绝了！

options.text: No way! I miss it so much. Let's swap recommendations!
Oh, really? I don't like spicy food.
I've never been there. Is it expensive?

content.explanation: 正确答案使用 'No way!' 表达惊喜和共鸣，符合场景中‘寻找共同点’的情感互动要求。干扰项中，第二个否定了共同兴趣，第三个转移话题，第四个只问价格，均未回应情感共鸣或建立连接。

content.speakerText: You like hiking? I’ve hiked Mount Tai three times!
content.speakerTextCn: 你喜欢徒步？我爬过泰山三次了！

options.text: Seriously? I’ve been wanting to climb it! What’s the best trail?
Mount Tai? I think it’s too crowded.
Cool. What time do you usually go?

content.explanation: 正确答案使用 'Seriously?' 表达惊喜，并主动追问细节，体现共同兴趣的深化。干扰项中，第二个完全回避话题，第三个表达负面评价，第四个虽相关但缺乏情感共鸣，不符合‘寻找共同点’的核心目标。

content.speakerText: You’re into indie music? I saw The Strokes live in Brooklyn last summer!
content.speakerTextCn: 你喜欢独立音乐？我去年夏天在布鲁克林看过The Strokes的现场！

options.text: No way! I saw them too — that concert changed my life!
I don’t know who that is.

content.explanation: 正确答案用 'No way!' 表达强烈共鸣，并进一步分享个人情感体验，完美契合场景。干扰项中，第一个完全否定兴趣，第二个和第三个回避或否定共同点，第四个虽相关但过于琐碎，缺乏情感连接。

content.template: Wait, you're from Chengdu? I went there last year — best hot pot ever! No way! I miss it so much. Let's swap ______!
content.hint: 表达交换建议时的固定搭配
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达：swap recommendations（交换推荐）

content.template: You like hiking? I’ve hiked Mount Tai three times! ______? I’ve been wanting to climb it!
content.hint: 表达惊讶和共鸣的常用感叹词
content.knowledgePoint: 情感共鸣表达：Seriously? / No way!（加强情绪共鸣）

content.template: You’re into indie music? I saw The Strokes live in Brooklyn! No way! I saw them too — that concert ______ my life!
content.hint: 表达深刻影响时的地道动词搭配
content.knowledgePoint: 动词搭配：change one's life（改变人生，情感共鸣高频表达）

content.speakerText: Wait, you're from Chengdu? I went there last year — best hot pot ever!
content.speakerTextCn: 等等，你是成都的？我去年去过，那里的火锅绝了！
expectedAnswers: No way! I miss it so much. Let's swap recommendations!
Seriously? I’ve been dying to try that place you mentioned!
Cool! I’ll check it out — do you have a favorite spot?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否回应了共同点并表达共鸣
语言准确性：是否正确使用了 'No way!' 或 'Seriously?' 等情感表达
表达自然度：是否使用了地道口语表达，如 'swap recommendations' 或 'dying to try'
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'Chengdu', 'hot pot', 'recommendations' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: You’re into yoga? I’ve been doing it for five years!
content.speakerTextCn: 你喜欢瑜伽？我已经练了五年了！
expectedAnswers: No way! I just started last month — any tips?
Seriously? I’ve been looking for a good studio. Where do you go?
That’s awesome! I’ve been wanting to get back into it. Do you recommend online classes?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否建立共同兴趣并推动对话深入
语言准确性：是否使用正确的情感回应词（No way!/Seriously?）
表达自然度：是否使用口语化表达如 'looking for', 'get back into', 'any tips?'
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'yoga', 'studio', 'classes', 'tips' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: You love coffee? I’ve tried over 50 cafés in Tokyo!
content.speakerTextCn: 你喜欢咖啡？我在东京喝过50多家咖啡馆！
expectedAnswers: Seriously? I’ve been planning a trip to Tokyo — what’s your favorite?
No way! I’m obsessed with Japanese coffee culture. Any hidden gems?
Cool! I’m a latte person — do you prefer pour-over or espresso?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否回应共同点并激发进一步交流
语言准确性：是否正确使用 'Seriously?' 或 'No way!' 表达惊喜
表达自然度：是否使用自然口语如 'hidden gems', 'obsessed with', 'prefer...or...'
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'coffee', 'Tokyo', 'café', 'recommend' 等场景关键词
